overview.description: Network traffic monitoring research lab at FIT CTU Prague, analyzing terabits per second of live backbone traffic for security research
overview.description_long: The Network Traffic Monitoring Lab (NETMON) at FIT CTU Prague is a research group embedded in the operations of CESNET, the Czech national research and education network. The lab works at the intersection of network security, high-performance computing, big data, machine learning, and AI. Key research areas include hardware-accelerated packet processing (FPGA/COMBO cards with P4 language), IP flow analytics, anomaly and botnet detection, and ML-based classification of encrypted traffic (TLS, QUIC). The lab produces widely used open-source tools such as NEMEA, IPFIXcol2, CESNET-DataZoo, and CESNET-Models.
overview.tagline: We analyze terabits per second of live backbone traffic to understand, secure, and improve the Internet.

history.origin_story: Founded through long-term cooperation between FIT CTU and CESNET, the Czech national academic network operator. The lab evolved from a hardware/FPGA focus to emphasize software tools, large-scale data analysis, and network security research.

key_milestones.event: Released CESNET-TLS22 — 42GB labeled TLS 1.3 encrypted traffic dataset
Released CESNET-TimeSeries24 dataset for anomaly detection and forecasting
Published in IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management on deep learning for traffic forecasting and classification

financials.parent_company: Czech Technical University in Prague (FIT ČVUT)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Academic research group at FIT CTU — not a commercial entity. Research output (datasets, tools, publications) feeds into the community rather than competing with AI models.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Grant- and university-funded research group embedded within FIT CTU and CESNET operations. Not subject to commercial market dynamics.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Institutionally embedded at Czech Technical University (FIT) with long-standing partnership with CESNET (Czech national research network). Funding comes from academic grants and CESNET operational budget.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: NETMON is a stable academic research lab with an established institutional home (FIT ČVUT), a long-running operational partner (CESNET), a proven publication record, and widely used open-source tools. No meaningful commercial risk.

metadata.notes: Official lab website: https://netmon.fit.cvut.cz/. FIT ČVUT page: https://www.fit.cvut.cz/cs/veda-a-vyzkum/zazemi/laboratore/8356-laborator-monitorovani-sitoveho-provozu-netmon. Contact email: netmon@fit.cvut.cz. GitHub: https://github.com/CESNET.
